stoppingPoint: Stop after fixture/temp-only screen shader watchdog migration proof. Do not continue into production gate enforcement, compile-aware validation, live shader compile, or runtime mutation in this sprint.

recommendedNextSprint.type: screen shader production gate enforcement decision
recommendedNextSprint.objective: Decide whether to migrate production writes into the proven display/render watchdog gate, keep temporary writable migration-candidate status, or propose block/removal with explicit user approval.
mustNotDo: do not run live shader compile
do not use active render state
do not add compile-aware validation unless separately approved

laterOptionalSprint.precondition: Only after display/render watchdog migration proof is completed or an explicit block/removal proposal is approved.
laterOptionalSprint.allowedDirection: standalone/temp shader fixture validation only if a non-live compiler path is proven safe
